gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/202)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/202)
text: دَخَلْتُ عَلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) بِمِنًى وَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ الثَّانِي ( عليه السلام ) عَلَى فَخِذِهِ وَ هُوَ يُقَشِّرُ لَهُ مَوْزاً وَ يُطْعِمُهُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from his father, from Muhammad Bin Abu Umeyr, from Yahya Bin Musa Al Sanainy who said,

‘I went to Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> at Mina, and Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> the 2<sup>nd</sup> at Mina, and Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> the 3<sup>rd</sup> (9th Imam<sup>asws</sup>) was upon his<sup>asws</sup> thigh, and he<sup>asws</sup> was peeling a banana him<sup>asws</sup> and feeding him<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from his father from Muhammad ibn abu ‘Umayr from Yahya ibn Musa, San’aniy who has said the following: “I once visited abu al-Hassan, al-Rida’, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, in Mina and abu Ja‘far, al-Thaniy was in his lap. He (the Imam) peeled banana and fed him (abu Ja‘far, al-Thaniy).”’
